description.en: Use when a user wants to add a module to extend the multi-sig wallet's functionality. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.
description.de: Use when a user wants to add a module to extend the multi-sig wallet's functionality. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.
description.es: Use when a user wants to add a module to extend the multi-sig wallet's functionality. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.

description.it: Use when a user wants to add a module to extend the multi-sig wallet's functionality. Creates a proposal that needs quorum approval.

inputs.name: Module Address
inputs.description: The address of the smart contract module to add.

messages.success: Proposal created successfully. Action ID: {{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}}. The proposal to add a module is now awaiting signatures.

label.en: Get notified when this proposal is signed
label.de: Benachrichtigung erhalten, wenn dieser Vorschlag unterzeichnet wird
label.es: Recibe notificación cuando se firme esta propuesta
label.fr: Sois informé quand cette proposition est signée
label.ro: Fii notificat când această propunere este semnată
label.it: Ricevi notifica quando questa proposta viene firmata

body.en: A board member has signed proposal #{{ACTION_ID_NUMBER}} to add a module
